hero_eyebrow: LaunchOS | Turn Skills into Profitable Products
community_pitch: A gameplan tool to create your digital product launch based on the time you have, niche, mood and what works for you. Researches profitable products before it comes with a timeline and plan.
author: Vlad
name: Vlad
cta_heading: Stop trading hours for money. Start selling what you know.
title: Vlad | Turning skills to profit
hero_headline: Your skills are already worth money. I show you how.
hero_sub: For over a decade I made my living behind the camera. Then I turned my own tools and systems into digital products that sold to more than 1,000 photographers. Here I write about how you can do the same.
cta_text: A gameplan tool to create your digital product launch based on the time you have, niche, mood and what works for you. Researches profitable products before it comes with a timeline and plan.
description: I help creators turn the skills they already have into profitable digital products.
